case_title: UNITED CHARTER SERVICE INC VS PEERLES STAGES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-10-1991, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
